allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix(dreamdust): restore point cloud visibility

Increase point sizes and lower noise threshold to make point cloud clearly visible:
- Point sizing: 3/2/10 → 12/8/24 (base/min/max)
- Noise threshold: 0.92 → 0.35 (less aggressive gating)

This restores visibility of the 89k point cloud which was rendering as barely-visible speck.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(gh pr create --base main --title "fix(dreamdust): restore point cloud visibility" --body "$(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

Restores visibility of the Dreamdust point cloud by increasing point sizes and lowering the noise threshold.

**Changes:**
- Point sizing: 3/2/10 → 12/8/24 (base/min/max)
- Noise threshold: 0.92 → 0.35 (less aggressive gating)

**Before:** Point cloud rendered as barely-visible speck
**After:** Point cloud clearly visible (89,441 points)

## Test plan

- [x] Build succeeds
- [x] Point cloud visibly renders on `/quiz/archetype-v1?pc=scene-02`
- [ ] Performance acceptable on real GPU (user will test)
- [ ] Point size can be adjusted via debug panel slider if needed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)")
Bash(bash -l -c '. $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20.19.5 && pnpm --filter cryptiq-mindmap-demo run build')
Bash(bash -l -c '. $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20.19.5 && pnpm --filter cryptiq-mindmap-demo dev')

notes: Local settings intentionally minimal; project-level permissions apply.
